Meet the Founder

Dr. Elijah — CEO & Founder

2025
FOUNDED
"There is no reason to miss out on the opportunity to be part of this system."

Elijah, popularly known as Dr. Elijah, is the CEO of Zenith Online Tutorials. He founded Zenith Online Tutorials out of a strong passion to impact and support students across the nation.

Zenith Online Tutorials was established on 11th May, 2025, and was officially started on 17th May, 2025. Since its inception, the platform has worked with and supported students across different academic pathways, including post-UTME preparation, foundational science classes, and guidance for admission into institutions such as the University of Benin (UNIBEN), University of Port Harcourt (UNIPORT), Medicine and Surgery programs, School of Nursing, and many others.

Each academic session, including the recent JAMB preparation cycle, has maintained the same commitment, consistency, and energy toward helping students prepare better and aim higher.

Dr. Elijah continues to lead Zenith Online Tutorials with a clear mission: to guide students toward achieving their academic goals through structured learning and quality preparation. There is no reason to miss out on the opportunity to be part of this system.

DR. ELIJAH CEO & Founder
2026 Program

ZENITH 2026 POST-UTME INTENSIVE CLASSES

Zenith Online Tutorials POST-UTME paid classes are starting on the 17th of May. This is a 3-month intensive program — a complete 12-week academic training designed to cover the entire POST-UTME syllabus using our proven Triple-Layer Learning System.

Weeks 1 – 4

🏗️ The Foundation Stage

This stage focuses on building the academic foundation many students lack. Some students did not perform well in JAMB because of weak basics and poor understanding of core concepts. Even students who scored high in JAMB still have lapses in certain areas. This stage helps students identify those weaknesses, strengthen their basics, and build a solid understanding.

Weeks 5 – 8

📈 The Development Stage

At this point, students already understand the basics and now begin to develop confidence, depth, and strong academic balance. This stage helps students break free from poor academic background and weak comprehension. Many students score above 300 in JAMB but still struggle with simple POST-UTME questions because their academic foundation is weak. This is why some scholars with very high JAMB scores still fail POST-UTME examinations. Here, students are trained to stand their ground academically and approach questions with confidence and understanding.

Weeks 9 – 12

🏆 The Mastery Stage

This is where students master the syllabus properly, sharpen their speed and accuracy, and become fully prepared for their examinations. At this stage, students are trained to face examinations with confidence and excellence.

⚠️ Please Note: These POST-UTME classes are available for all universities and Schools of Nursing except UNILAG. We are not offering UNILAG POST-UTME classes this year.

Zenith Online Tutorials offers top-notch teaching, a well-structured academic system, and a proven method that has produced multiple excellent results in JAMB and admissions. Last year (the first post-UTME classes) into Medicine and Surgery (UNIBEN), Medicine and Surgery (UNIPORT), Schools of Nursing, and several competitive university programs.

Join us and prepare for success.
Our 2026 UTME Record

We Show Results.
We Don't Cap.

OUR 2026 UTME RECORD

With our very first UTME classes, Zenith Online Tutorials achieved a historic milestone by producing two scholars who scored 360+ in JAMB 2026 ...a massive achievement that speaks clearly for the effectiveness of our proven system.

This result is a strong reminder that excellence is not limited to students with extraordinary academic backgrounds. At Zenith Online Tutorials, we have built a structured and results-driven learning system designed to help every serious student maximize their potential and achieve outstanding success.

One powerful testimony is Damilola's journey: From a first UTME score of 199, to 222, and after joining Zenith Online Tutorials alongside Dr. Elijah's Personal Mentorship and Procedure & JAMB Classes, she achieved an incredible score of 355.

This transformation proves that with the right guidance, mentorship, strategy, and consistency, your dream score is absolutely achievable regardless of your starting point or academic background.

Your admission dream is still on track. Your success is still possible.

So if you are truly ready to gain admission once and for all, then Zenith Online Tutorials is the right place to be.

Post-UTME Success

181 → 312 in Post-UTME (78%)

JAMB: 181 → Screening Score: 312 (78%)

We can see a student who scored 181 in JAMB was able to significantly improve their performance in Post-UTME through focused preparation. This shows that with the right guidance and consistent effort, students can improve beyond their initial results.

At Zenith Online Tutorials, our goal is to support students at different academic levels and help them prepare more effectively for their exams. We believe that with the right system, structure, and commitment, students can make real progress toward their academic goals.

Whether your JAMB score is 170, 180, 190, 200, or higher, what matters most is how you prepare next. Improvement is possible when you follow the right strategy and stay consistent.

That is what our motto represents: Bringing your Academic dreams to reality → through better preparation and guidance
